title: Outreach vs Zendesk
description: Compare Outreach vs Zendesk in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Zendesk emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Outreach or Zendesk?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Zendesk edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Outreach excels at Sales engagement platform with sequence automation and analytics., while Zendesk is stronger for Leading support platform with ticketing, knowledge base, and AI bots.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Outreach and Zendesk?
faqs.answer: Outreach and Zendesk differ in pricing ($100-250/mo vs $55–$115/agent/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Outreach cheaper than Zendesk?
faqs.answer: Outreach starts at $100-250/mo while Zendesk starts at $55–$115/agent/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Outreach or Zendesk?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for crm & sales. Zendesk scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Outreach and Zendesk together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Outreach or Zendesk?
faqs.answer: Both Outreach and Zendesk prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which crm & sales tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Outreach for large teams, while Zendesk may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $100-250/mo pricing.
